Bobby's Story Pinyin Bobby's Story Bobby的故事 BOBBY'S STORY Bobby的故事 Bobby的 Bobby's 故事 story Mr. Grizley's Class Grizley老师的班级 Mr. Grizley's Class Grizley老师的班级 Grizley老师的 Mr. Grizley's 班级 class CHAPTER 1: Running Late! Bobby raced out of the copy shop and crashed into a teenage girl. “Sorry about that,” he said. “Are you okay?” the girl asked. She was dressed in purple from head to toe. 第一章——快迟到了 Bobby从复印店冲出来，撞上了一个十几岁的女孩。 “对不起，”他说。 “你没事吧？”女孩问。她全身都穿着紫色的衣服。 CHAPTER 1 第一章 Running Late 快迟到了 Bobby Bobby raced out of the copy shop 从复印店冲出来 and crashed into 撞上了 a teenage girl 一个十几岁的女孩 Sorry about that 对不起 he said 他说 Are you okay 你没事吧 the girl asked 女孩问 She 她 was dressed in 穿着 purple 紫色的衣服 from head to toe 全身 第一章 Chapter 1 快迟到了 running late Bobby Bobby 从复印店 from the copy shop 冲出来 rushed out 撞上了 bumped into 一个十几岁的女孩 a teenage girl 对不起 sorry 他 he 说 said 你 you 没事吧 are okay 女孩 the girl 问 asked 她 she 全身 from head to toe 都 all 穿着 was wearing 紫色的衣服 purple clothes Bobby nodded. “I’m all right,” he said. He noticed the girl’s outfit and smiled. “You must like purple,” Bobby said. “Check this out. I made it.” Bobby点了点头。“我没事，”他说。 他注意到女孩的衣服，笑了笑。“你一定很喜欢紫色。你看，这是我做的。” Bobby nodded Bobby点了点头 I’m all right 我没事 he said 他说 He 他 noticed 注意到 the girl’s outfit 女孩的衣服 and smiled 笑了笑 You 你 must 一定 like purple 很喜欢紫色 Bobby said Bobby说 Check this out 你看 I made it 这是我做的 Bobby Bobby 点了点头 nodded 我 I 没事 am okay 他 he 说 said 他 he 注意到 noticed 女孩的 the girl's 衣服 clothes 笑了笑 smiled 你 you 一定 must 很喜欢 really like 紫色 purple 你看 look 这是 this is 我 I 做的 made He handed her a copy of a small comic book. “The Adventure of Purple Potato,” she read. “Cool. We match.” Bobby grinned. “I’m Bobby,” he said. 他递给她一本小漫画书。 “《紫色土豆历险记》。”她念道，“真酷。我们很搭。” Bobby咧嘴笑了。“我叫Bobby。” He 他 handed her 递给她 a copy of 一本 a small comic book 小漫画书 The Adventure of Purple Potato 紫色土豆历险记 she read 她念道 Cool 真酷 We match 我们很搭 Bobby grinned Bobby咧嘴笑了 I’m Bobby 我叫Bobby he said 他说 他 he 递给 gave to 她 her 一本 a copy of 小漫画书 small comic book 《紫色土豆历险记》 The Adventure of Purple Potato 她 she 念道 read aloud 真酷 really cool 我们 we 很搭 match well Bobby Bobby 咧嘴笑了 grinned 我叫 my name is Bobby Bobby “My name is Ashley,” the girl said. “My high school is trying to raise awareness about helping people who are homeless.” She handed Bobby a flyer. He read it quickly. “Wow,” Bobby said. “I didn’t know any of this.” “我叫Ashley，”女孩说。“我们高中正在做活动，想让更多人了解怎么帮助无家可归的人。” 她递给Bobby一张传单。Bobby很快看了一遍。 “哇，”Bobby说。“这些我以前都不知道。” My name is Ashley 我叫Ashley the girl said 女孩说 My high school 我们高中 is trying to raise awareness 正在做活动想让更多人了解 about helping 怎么帮助 people who are homeless 无家可归的人 She 她 handed Bobby 递给Bobby a flyer 一张传单 He Bobby read it quickly 很快看了一遍 Wow 哇 Bobby said Bobby说 I didn’t know 我以前都不知道 any of this 这些 我叫 my name is Ashley Ashley 女孩 the girl 说 said 我们高中 our high school 正在做活动 is doing an activity 想 wants 让更多人了解 to let more people know 怎么帮助 how to help 无家可归的人 people without homes 她 she 递给 gave to Bobby Bobby 一张传单 a flyer Bobby Bobby 很快 quickly 看了一遍 read through once 哇 wow Bobby Bobby 说 said 这些 these things 我 I 以前 before 都 all 不知道 did not know “We need volunteers to spread the word,” Ashley said. “Will you help?” “Sure,” Bobby said. “I’ll even ask my class. I’m sure they’ll want to help.” Ashley thanked Bobby for the comic book. He thanked Ashley for the flyer. Then, he hurried off to school. “我们需要志愿者帮忙宣传，”Ashley说。“你愿意帮忙吗？” “当然，”Bobby说。“我还会问问我们班。我相信他们也会想帮忙。” Ashley谢过Bobby送给她的漫画书。Bobby也谢过Ashley给他的传单。然后，他赶紧往学校跑去。 We 我们 need 需要 volunteers 志愿者 to spread the word 帮忙宣传 Ashley said Ashley说 Will you help 你愿意帮忙吗 Sure 当然 Bobby said Bobby说 I’ll even ask 我还会问问 my class 我们班 I’m sure 我相信 they’ll want to help 他们也会想帮忙 Ashley thanked Bobby Ashley谢过Bobby for the comic book 送给她的漫画书 He thanked Ashley Bobby也谢过Ashley for the flyer 给他的传单 Then 然后 he hurried off 他赶紧跑去 to school 往学校 我们 we 需要 need 志愿者 volunteers 帮忙 to help 宣传 spread the word Ashley Ashley 说 said 你 you 愿意 are willing 帮忙吗 to help 当然 of course Bobby Bobby 说 said 我 I 还会 will also 问问 ask 我们班 our class 我 I 相信 believe 他们 they 也 also 会 will 想帮忙 want to help Ashley Ashley 谢过 thanked Bobby Bobby 送给她的 for giving her 漫画书 comic book Bobby Bobby 也 also 谢过 thanked Ashley Ashley 给他的 for giving him 传单 flyer 然后 then 他 he 赶紧 quickly 往学校跑去 ran toward school CHAPTER 2: Attention, Please? Bobby made it to class before the bell rang. He passed his comic books around. “Awesome!” Shaw said. “I can’t wait to read it.” Bobby remembered the flyer just as the bell rang. “I have one more thing,” he said. “It will have to wait,” said Mr. Grizley. “We’ve got a busy day today.” 第二章——请听我说，好吗？ Bobby在上课铃响之前赶到了教室。他把自己的漫画书传给大家看。 “太棒了！”Shaw说。“我等不及要看了。” 就在铃声响起的时候，Bobby想起了那张传单。 “我还有一件事想说。”他说。 “那得等一等了，”Grizley老师说。“我们今天很忙。” CHAPTER 2 第二章 Attention Please 请听我说好吗 Bobby Bobby made it to class 赶到了教室 before the bell rang 在上课铃响之前 He 他 passed his comic books around 把自己的漫画书传给大家看 Awesome 太棒了 Shaw said Shaw说 I can’t wait 我等不及 to read it 要看了 Bobby Bobby remembered 想起了 the flyer 那张传单 just as the bell rang 就在铃声响起的时候 I have 我有 one more thing 还有一件事想说 he said 他说 It 那 will have to wait 得等一等了 said Mr. Grizley Grizley老师说 We’ve got 我们有 a busy day today 今天很忙 第二章 Chapter 2 请听我说 please listen to me 好吗 okay Bobby Bobby 在上课铃响之前 before the class bell rang 赶到了 arrived at 教室 classroom 他 he 把自己的 his own 漫画书 comic books 传给大家看 passed around for everyone to read 太棒了 awesome Shaw Shaw 说 said 我 I 等不及 can't wait 要看了 to read it 就在铃声响起的时候 just as the bell rang Bobby Bobby 想起了 remembered 那张传单 that flyer 我 I 还有 still have 一件事 one thing 想说 want to say 他 he 说 said 那 that 得等一等了 will have to wait Grizley老师 Mr. Grizley 说 said 我们 we 今天 today 很忙 are very busy At recess, Bobby tried to talk to his classmates about the flyer. “Can I show you something?” he asked Camila. She was jumping rope. “Maybe later,” Camila said. “I’m trying to break my record.” 课间休息时，Bobby想跟同学们说说那张传单的事。 “我可以给你看个东西吗？”他问Camila。Camila正在跳绳。 “晚一点吧，”Camila说。“我想打破自己的纪录。” At recess 课间休息时 Bobby Bobby tried to talk 想说说 to his classmates 跟同学们 about the flyer 那张传单的事 Can I 我可以 show you something 给你看个东西吗 he asked Camila 他问Camila She Camila was jumping rope 正在跳绳 Maybe later 晚一点吧 Camila said Camila说 I’m trying to 我想 break 打破 my record 自己的纪录 课间休息时 at recess Bobby Bobby 想 wanted 跟同学们 to classmates 说说 talk about 那张传单的事 the matter of that flyer 我 I 可以 can 给你看个东西吗 show you something 他 he 问 asked Camila Camila Camila Camila 正在跳绳 was jumping rope 晚一点吧 maybe later Camila Camila 说 said 我 I 想 want 打破 break 自己的 my own 纪录 record Bobby found Dmitry and Alijah playing tetherball. “Can I talk to you guys about something important?” Bobby asked. “Sure,” Alijah said. “As soon as our game is finished.” Bobby见两人玩球。“能说件事吗？”他问。对方答：“打完说。” Bobby Bobby found 见 Dmitry and Alijah 两人 playing tetherball 玩球 Can I 能 talk to you guys 说 about something important 件事吗 Bobby asked 他问 Sure 对方答 Alijah said 对方答 As soon as 打完 our game 这局 is finished 说 Bobby Bobby 见 saw 两人 the two 玩球 playing ball 能 can 说 say 件事吗 something 他 he 问 asked 对方 the other person 答 answered 打完 after finishing 说 talk Nobody would listen to Bobby. At the end of the day, Mr. Grizley stopped Bobby on his way out of class. “I read the latest Purple Potato comic book,” Mr. Grizley said. “It’s your best one yet. It looks like it’s a hit with the class too.” 没有人听Bobby讲那张传单的事。 放学时，Bobby正要走出教室，Grizley老师叫住了他。 “我看了最新的《紫色土豆》漫画，”Grizley老师说。“这是你目前最好的一本。看来班上的同学也很喜欢。” Nobody 没有人 would listen to Bobby 听Bobby讲那张传单的事 At the end of the day 放学时 Mr. Grizley Grizley老师 stopped Bobby 叫住了Bobby on his way out of class 正要走出教室 I read 我看了 the latest 最新的 Purple Potato comic book 紫色土豆漫画 Mr. Grizley said Grizley老师说 It’s 这是 your best one yet 你目前最好的一本 It looks like 看来 it’s a hit 很喜欢 with the class too 班上的同学也 没有人 no one 听 listened to Bobby Bobby 讲 talk about 那张传单的事 the matter of that flyer 放学时 at the end of school Bobby Bobby 正要 was just about to 走出 leave 教室 classroom Grizley老师 Mr. Grizley 叫住了 stopped 他 him 我 I 看了 read 最新的 the latest 《紫色土豆》 Purple Potato 漫画 comic Grizley老师 Mr. Grizley 说 said 这是 this is 你 your 目前 so far 最好的一本 best one 看来 it looks like 班上的同学 the classmates 也 also 很喜欢 like it very much “Thanks,” Bobby said. “Too bad I can’t get them to pay attention to this.” He handed Mr. Grizley the flyer about people who are homeless. Mr. Grizley read the flyer. “谢谢，”Bobby说。“可惜我没办法让他们注意这件事。” 他把那张关于无家可归的人的传单递给Grizley老师。Grizley老师看了看传单。 Thanks 谢谢 Bobby said Bobby说 Too bad 可惜 I can’t 我没办法 get them to 让他们 pay attention to 注意 this 这件事 He 他 handed Mr. Grizley 递给Grizley老师 the flyer 那张传单 about people who are homeless 关于无家可归的人 Mr. Grizley Grizley老师 read the flyer 看了看传单 谢谢 thanks Bobby Bobby 说 said 可惜 too bad 我 I 没办法 have no way 让他们 make them 注意 pay attention to 这件事 this matter 他 he 把那张关于无家可归的人的传单 that flyer about people without homes 递给 gave to Grizley老师 Mr. Grizley Grizley老师 Mr. Grizley 看了看 looked over 传单 the flyer “Don’t give up,” Mr. Grizley said. “You just need to find the right way to tell the story.” “别放弃，”Grizley老师说。“你只是需要找到一个合适的方法，把这件事讲给大家听。” Don’t give up 别放弃 Mr. Grizley said Grizley老师说 You 你 just need to 只是需要 find 找到 the right way 一个合适的方法 to tell the story 把这件事讲给大家听 别放弃 do not give up Grizley老师 Mr. Grizley 说 said 你 you 只是 only 需要 need 找到 find 一个合适的方法 a suitable way 把这件事 this matter 讲给大家听 tell to everyone CHAPTER 3: Purple Potato to the Rescue! That night, Bobby thought about Mr. Grizley’s advice. It gave him an idea. Bobby drew a new Purple Potato comic. In it, the Purple Potato helped families who were homeless. 第三章——紫色土豆来救援! 那天晚上，Bobby想起了Grizley老师的建议。这个建议让他有了一个主意。 Bobby画了一本新的《紫色土豆》漫画。在漫画里，紫色土豆帮助无家可归的家庭。 chapter 3 第三章 purple potato to the rescue 紫色土豆来救援 that night 那天晚上 bobby bobby thought about 想起了 mr grizley’s advice grizley老师的建议 it 这个建议 gave him 让他有了 an idea 一个主意 bobby bobby drew 画了 a new 一本新的 purple potato comic 紫色土豆漫画 in it 在漫画里 the purple potato 紫色土豆 helped 帮助 families who were homeless 无家可归的家庭 第三章 chapter 3 紫色土豆 purple potato 来救援 comes to rescue 那天晚上 that night bobby bobby 想起了 thought of grizley老师的 mr grizley's 建议 advice 这个建议 this advice 让他 made him 有了一个主意 have an idea bobby bobby 画了 drew 一本新的 a new copy of 《紫色土豆》 purple potato 漫画 comic 在漫画里 in the comic 紫色土豆 purple potato 帮助 helped 无家可归的家庭 families without homes The next morning, Bobby arrived early to school. He carried a stack of new Purple Potato comic books. The class started reading them right away. 第二天早上，Bobby早早就到校。他带来一摞新的《紫色土豆》漫画书。大家马上读。 The next morning 第二天早上 Bobby Bobby arrived 到了 early to school 早早就到校 He 他 carried 带来 a stack of 一摞 new 新的 Purple Potato comic books 《紫色土豆》漫画书 The class 大家 started reading them 读 right away 马上 第二天早上 the next morning Bobby Bobby 早早 early 就 already 到校 arrived at school 他 he 带来 brought 一摞 a stack of 新的 new 《紫色土豆》 Purple Potato 漫画书 comic books 大家 everyone 马上 right away 读 read “Is this true?” Alijah asked. “There are more than one million students without homes in the country?” Bobby nodded. “Yes, it’s true,” he said. “这是真的吗？”Alijah问。“全国有一百多万学生没有自己的家？” Bobby点点头。“是真的。” Is this true 这是真的吗 Alijah asked Alijah问 There are 有 more than one million 一百多万 students 学生 without homes 没有自己的家 in the country 全国 Bobby nodded Bobby点点头 Yes 是 it’s true 真的 he said 他说 这是真的吗 is this true Alijah Alijah 问 asked 全国 in the whole country 有 there are 一百多万 more than one million 学生 students 没有 do not have 自己的家 their own homes Bobby Bobby 点点头 nodded 是真的 it is true “I didn’t know any of this,” Camila said. “It says here that the number of students without homes is getting bigger every year.” “That’s right,” Bobby said. “That’s why we need to do what we can to help.” “这些我以前都不知道，”Camila说。“这里说，没有家的学生每年都在变多。” “没错，”Bobby说。“所以我们要尽自己的一份力去帮忙。” I didn’t know 我以前都不知道 any of this 这些 Camila said Camila说 It says here that 这里说 the number of students 学生 without homes 没有家 is getting bigger 在变多 every year 每年 That’s right 没错 Bobby said Bobby说 That’s why 所以 we need to 我们要 do what we can 尽自己的一份力 to help 去帮忙 这些 these things 我 I 以前 before 都 all 不知道 did not know Camila Camila 说 said 这里说 it says here 没有家的学生 students without homes 每年 every year 都 all 在变多 are becoming more 没错 that is right Bobby Bobby 说 said 所以 so 我们 we 要 need to 尽自己的一份力 do our part 去帮忙 to help Mr. Grizley put a hand on Bobby’s shoulder. “This is excellent work,” Mr. Grizley said. “We need to help,” Bobby said. “It’s the only way we can make a change.” Grizley老师把一只手搭在Bobby的肩膀上。“你做得非常好，”他说。 “我们得帮忙，”Bobby说。“只有这样，我们才能带来改变。” Mr. Grizley Grizley老师 put a hand 把一只手搭在 on Bobby’s shoulder Bobby的肩膀上 This is excellent work 你做得非常好 Mr. Grizley said 他说 We need to help 我们得帮忙 Bobby said Bobby说 It’s the only way 只有这样 we can make a change 我们才能带来改变 Grizley老师 Mr. Grizley 把一只手搭在 put one hand on Bobby的 Bobby's 肩膀上 shoulder 你 you 做得 did it 非常好 very well 他 he 说 said 我们 we 得 have to 帮忙 help Bobby Bobby 说 said 只有这样 only this way 我们 we 才能 can 带来改变 bring change “Okay, class,” Mr. Grizley said. “Who wants to help people who are homeless?” Every hand went up. Bobby beamed. “Wow,” Mr. Grizley said. “You really got their attention.” “好了，同学们，”Grizley老师说。“谁想帮助无家可归的人？” 大家都举起了手。Bobby开心地笑了。 “哇，”Grizley老师说。“你真的让大家注意到了这件事。” Okay class 好了同学们 Mr. Grizley said Grizley老师说 Who 谁 wants to help 想帮助 people who are homeless 无家可归的人 Every hand 大家 went up 都举起了手 Bobby beamed Bobby开心地笑了 Wow 哇 Mr. Grizley said Grizley老师说 You really 你真的 got their attention 让大家注意到了这件事 好了 okay 同学们 class Grizley老师 Mr. Grizley 说 said 谁 who 想 wants 帮助 help 无家可归的人 people without homes 大家 everyone 都 all 举起了手 raised their hands Bobby Bobby 开心地 happily 笑了 smiled 哇 wow Grizley老师 Mr. Grizley 说 said 你 you 真的 really 让大家 made everyone 注意到了 notice 这件事 this matter “I just followed your advice,” Bobby said. “I found the right way to tell my story.” “我只是照着你的建议去做，”Bobby说。“我找到了合适的方法，把我想讲的故事讲给大家听。” I just 我只是 followed your advice 照着你的建议去做 Bobby said Bobby说 I found 我找到了 the right way 合适的方法 to tell my story 把我想讲的故事讲给大家听 我 I 只是 only 照着 followed 你的 your 建议 advice 去做 did it Bobby Bobby 说 said 我 I 找到了 found 合适的方法 the right way 把我想讲的故事 the story I wanted to tell 讲给大家听 tell to everyone What is this picture? 这张照片是什么？ flyer 传单 volunteer 志愿者 outfit 衣服 comic books 漫画书 What is this picture? 这张照片是什么？ tether ball 绳球 flier 传单 jump rope 跳绳 volunteer 志愿者 What is this picture? 这张照片是什么？ homeless 无家可归的 jump rope 跳绳 tether ball 绳球 flyer 传单 Click the picture. Listen to the question. 点击图片。听这个问题。 comic books 漫画书 stories 故事 flyers 传单 a class project 一个班级项目 Click the picture. Listen to the question. 点击图片。听这个问题。 purple potatoes 紫色土豆 school children 学生 homeless people 无家可归的人 volunteers 志愿者 Complete the sentence! 完成句子！ "We need to spread the word," Ashley said. “我们需要 来帮忙宣传这件事，”阿什莉说。 flyers 传单 students 学生 volunteers 志愿者 homeless people 无家可归的人 Complete the sentence! 完成句子！ At recess, Bobby tried to . 课间休息时，鲍比想 。 talk to his classmates 和他的同学们谈话 jump rope 跳绳 play tetherball 玩绳球 pass his comic books 分发他的漫画书 Complete the sentence! 完成句子！ Mr. Grizley said, " " Mr. Grizley说：“ 。" Time to volunteer! 该去做志愿服务了！ I'm too busy! 我太忙了！ You are late! 你迟到了！ Don't give up! 不要放弃！ Retell the story! 重述故事！ Read out loud! 大声读出来！ Bobby raced out of the copy shop and crashed into a teenage girl. She was dressed in purple from head to toe. “You must like purple,” Bobby said. “Check this out. I made it.” He handed her a copy of a small comic book. “The Adventure of Purple Potato,” she read. The girl said. “My high school is trying to raise awareness about helping people who are homeless.” She handed Bobby a flyer. Bobby从复印店冲出来，撞上了一个十几岁的女孩。 她全身都穿着紫色的衣服。 “你一定很喜欢紫色。你看，这是我做的。” 他递给她一本小漫画书。 “《紫色土豆历险记》，”她念道。 女孩说：“我们高中正在做活动，想让更多人了解怎么帮助无家可归的人。”她递给Bobby一张传单。 Record your answer. 记录你的答案。 Write a sentence about this picture. 写一句关于这张照片。 Write your answer. 写你的答案。 How did Bobby get the attention of his classmates? Bobby是怎么让同学们注意到这件事的？ Write your answer. 写你的答案。 What did you like about the story? What did you like about the story? Match the words! 匹配单词！ flyer 传单 comic book 漫画书 tether ball 绳球 jump rope 跳绳 homeless 无家可归的 volunteer 志愿者 Bobby’s Story Bobby的故事
Author: Author: Bryan Patrick Avery Bryan Patrick Avery
Illustrator: Illustrator: Ariel Putra Ariel Putra
